order_confirmed_description: Your order has been confirmed successfully and is now being reviewed before shipment.
order_processing_description: Our team is currently processing your order and preparing your items for shipment.
order_shipped_description: Your order has been shipped successfully and is now on its way to your location.
order_delivered_description: Your order has been delivered successfully. Thank you for choosing our services.
network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
timeout_error: The request timed out. Please try again.
unauthorized_error: You are not authorized to perform this action.

on_boarding_1_description: Step into a world of fashion made just for you. Explore curated looks, trending outfits, and timeless pieces that match your personality and elevate your everyday style.
on_boarding_2_description: Tell us who you're shopping for so we can tailor every recommendation to your taste. Whether it's for men, women, or kids — we’ve got something perfect waiting for you.
on_boarding_3_description: Stay ahead with the newest collections from top brands. From casual essentials to standout pieces, discover everything you need to build your perfect wardrobe.
this_language_is_not_supported_yet: This language is not supported yet
is_applied_to_your_order_with: is applied to your order with
enjoy_a_more_special_shopping_experience: Enjoy a more special shopping experience with our exclusive vouchers
we_are_happy_to_inform_you_that_your_ord: We are happy to inform you that your order
thank_you_for_your_trust_in_shopping_at_: Thank you for your trust in shopping at our store
please_double_check_the_delivery_address: Please double-check the delivery address details before placing your order
name: Name
contact_us_description: We’re always happy to help! If you have any questions or issues, feel free to contact us anytime. Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you and make sure you have the best experience possible.
are_you_sure_you_want_to_logout: Are you sure you want to logout?
order_cancelled_description: Your order has been successfully cancelled. If any payment was deducted, it will be refunded according to the store policy.
order_success_description: Your order has been placed successfully and is now being prepared for shipping as soon as possible.
login_required_description: You need to sign in first to access this feature and continue using the application.
reset_password_success_description: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in using your new password.
promo_success_description: The promo code has been applied successfully to your order. Enjoy your discounted price.
promo_failed_description: Failed to apply the promo code. Please make sure the code is correct and still valid.
order_deleted_description: The order has been deleted successfully and will no longer appear in your current orders list.
review_submitted_description: Your review has been submitted successfully. Thank you for sharing your feedback and helping us improve the experience.
delete_order_message: Remove Order from Orders history (you cant undo this action) ?
cancel_order_message: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
max_resend_reached: You have reached the maximum number of OTP resend attempts.
